description: Revel in the indulgence of pure leather and look modern and stylish with ease in this pair of silver sandals from enroute. Pair it with western and ethnic wear, and look great both ways. This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you pack it when you travel. Upper Leather straps across midfoot in a stylish woven pattern and a buckled ankle strap Thong style toe in leather to hold sandal to your foot comfortably Ergonomically curved leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with light grooves on the forefoot, and a grooved slight TPU heel for absolute grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
